content.fact_text: Production-ready package.json manifest for the catalog and inventory management service.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines production-ready dependency environment for catalog and inventory management service, enabling stable execution of all required infrastructure integrations.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the environment configuration and dependency graph required to bootstrap the service securely and performantly within the ACN production ecosystem.

content.source_code:
{
  "name": "@acn/catalog-inventory-manager",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Production-ready Product Catalog and Inventory Management Service",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc",
    "start": "node dist/index.js",
    "lint": "eslint 'src/**/*.ts'",
    "test": "jest",
    "migrate": "knex migrate:latest",
    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "author": "ACN Actuator",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "dependencies": {
    "dotenv": "16.4.5",
    "ioredis": "5.4.1",
    "kafkajs": "2.2.4",
    "knex": "3.1.0",
    "opossum": "8.3.1",
    "pg": "8.12.0",
    "pino": "9.3.2",
    "pino-pretty": "11.2.2",
    "zod": "3.23.8"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/jest": "29.5.12",
    "@types/node": "20.14.10",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "7.14.1",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "7.14.1",
    "eslint": "8.57.0",
    "jest": "29.7.0",
    "ts-jest": "29.1.5",
    "typescript": "5.5.3"
  }
}
